title: PAssion Card
text:
PAssion Card - SupportGoWhere
PAssion Card
Share link
A membership programme that allows its members to enjoy great discounts on courses and activities available at all Community Clubs and other PA outlets such as PAssion Wave. Members can also enjoy exclusive discounts at more than 2,000 participating PAssion Merchant outlets.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
PAssion Members can earn yuu Points at various outlets and contribute to community projects
PAssion Silver Concession Card for seniors offers concessionary fares on public transport and merchant benefits
PAssion POSB Debit Card functions as an ATM, NETS, Debit MasterCard, and EZ-Link card, and offers savings, rewards, and privileges
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Exclusive privileges for courses, activities, and programmes

Unique promotions with lifestyle merchants and partners

PAssion POSB Debit Card offers savings, rewards, and privileges at over 2,000 places and functions as an ATM, NETS, Debit MasterCard, and EZ-Link card

PAssion Silver Concession Card provides seniors with concessionary fares on public transport and merchant benefits

PAssion Members get access to exclusive privileges on eCapitaVoucher and deals on the CapitaStar App

By linking your PAssion Card to yuu Rewards Club, you can earn yuu Points from a wide-ranging coalition of diverse and market-leading brands including BreadTalk, CS Fresh, Cold Storage, Giant, Guardian Health & Beauty, 7 Eleven, Mandai.com, Toast Box and many more

You can also earn yuu Points through participation PAssion CARES events organised by PA

Free PAssion e-Membership for all aged 15 and above with a valid Singpass

Auto-conversion of expiring PAssion Card to e-Membership for continuous access to benefits

Who is this for?

Membership available for all aged 15 and above with a valid Singpass

PAssion POSB Debit Card for those aged 16 and above with a POSB/DBS Savings or Current account

PAssion Silver Concession Card for Singapore Citizens aged 60 and above

How to apply?

To sign up for a PAssion card:

Visit any Community Clubs or online

The 5-year PAssion Card membership fees are:

$12.00 for a Principal Card (for ages between 18 and 59 years old)

$10.00 for a Principal Card (for ages below 18 years old, and 60 years old and above)

To sign up for a free PAssion e-Membership:

Visit onePA | Membership

Use your Singpass to sign in to the app

Free membership available to members of public aged 15 years and above

To sign up for PAssion POSB Debit Card, visit http://www.posb.com.sg/PAssion.

To apply for PAssion Silver Concession Card, visit this link or submit your application via SimplyGo Ticket Offices or SimplyGo App.

Where can I find help?

View more details

PA Contact Centre’s Hotline: 6225 5322

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest Community Centre (CC)

Scheme last updated 30 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
